# CloudChat.tech — Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

CloudChat.tech is a podcast website built with **Hexo 8.1.1**. The theme uses **Nunjucks** templates (not EJS) in `themes/cloudchat/layout/` and **Tailwind CSS** for styling. The site is deployed to GitHub Pages via the workflow in `.github/workflows/pages.yml`.

## Brand

- Primary color: `#002145` (dark blue)
- Secondary color: `#1f2937` (Tailwind gray-800)
- Hosts: **Carl** and **Brandon**
- Tone: conversational, technically grounded, slightly playful but not childish

## Episode Conventions

### File naming

Episode source files live in `source/_posts/` and are named `NNNN-slug-title.md` where `NNNN` is a zero-padded 4-digit episode number (e.g., `0030-local-first-lifeboats.md`).

### Frontmatter

```yaml
---
episode: 0030
date: 2026-02-02
libsynId: 39959455
summary:
  A short description used for meta tags and episode list views. One to three
  sentences. Use YAML block scalar style for multi-line.
---
```

- **Do NOT set `title` in frontmatter.** The `scripts/lib/before_post_render.js` filter extracts the title from the first `# H1` heading in the markdown body, applies title case, and normalizes "Cloud Chat" → "CloudChat."
- `libsynId` is the numeric ID from Libsyn after audio upload. Leave it as a placeholder if not yet known.
- `summary` is used for `<meta>` description and the episode list item display.

### Optional guest block

```yaml
guest:
  name: Steven Murawski
  bio: |
    Multi-line biography text.
  socials:
    bluesky: handle.bsky.social
    linkedin: linkedin-slug
    twitter: handle
    web: https://example.com
```

The guest avatar filename is auto-generated by `before_post_render.js` as `avatar-{name-lowercased-hyphenated}.jpg` and served from `source/images/guests/`.

### Post asset folders

`post_asset_folder: true` is enabled in `_config.yml`. Each episode can have a sibling directory (e.g., `source/_posts/0030-local-first-lifeboats/`) for images. Place `opengraph-episode-facebook.png` and `opengraph-episode-twitter.png` in this folder — `before_post_render.js` auto-detects them and sets OG meta tags without any frontmatter changes.

### Markdown body structure

```markdown
# Episode Title Here

## Summary

Multi-paragraph conversational recap in present tense. Names the hosts and
any guests. Covers key topics discussed.

## Links

### Section heading (optional grouping)

- [Descriptive link text](https://example.com)
```

## Build & Serve

| Command | Alias (devcontainer) | Purpose |
|---------|---------------------|---------|
| `npm run build` | `build` | Generate static site to `public/` |
| `npm run server` | `serve` | Local dev server on port 4000 |
| `npm run clean` | `clean` | Remove generated files |
| `hexo new episode "title"` | `episode "title"` | Scaffold a new episode from `scaffolds/episode.md` |

## Transcript Staging

Place VTT transcripts (from Microsoft Teams) in the `tmp/` directory. This folder is gitignored and used as input for the `/write-episode-content` skill.

## Key Files

- `_config.yml` — Hexo configuration (permalink: `:year/:month/:name/`, timezone: America/New_York)
- `scaffolds/episode.md` — Episode scaffold template used by `hexo new episode`
- `scripts/lib/before_post_render.js` — Title extraction, title case, guest avatar naming, OG image auto-detection
- `scripts/lib/renderer.js` — PostCSS/Tailwind pipeline and episode pagination/JSON generators
- `themes/cloudchat/layout/` — Nunjucks templates (layout, post, episodes, partials)
